seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: New Chinese open-source model at Opus 4.7 class level; highlights rapid open-source progress narrowing US lead amid regulatory standstills.
Platform for hosting local open-source LLMs (Qwen, Gemma) with always-on agents and APIs; enables custom LLM apps/games using frontier models.

global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Decentralized per-agent private memory (exploitation/exploration pools with online router) for multi-agent systems; improves accuracy ~9% avg, up to 24%, cuts tokens ~49%, accelerates self-evolution 2.5x vs centralized baselines.
Open-source TS AI agent framework with observational memory; achieves 94.87% on LongMemEval, 10x cost reduction vs RAG without vector DBs via background compression and priority routing.
Benchmark for evolving environments with patch-based memory recording histories; boosts agent accuracy +1.5% overall, +3.7% chain-level, +6.1%/+4.8% on GAIA/LoCoMo.
Production-focused inference benchmark using long-context multi-turn agent workloads with KV cache reuse; metric 'Agents per Megawatt' for scalable deployment decisions.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Onchain AI agent stacks with verifiable identities, tool use, memory sharing, and multi-agent coordination.
near_misses.reason: Primarily crypto/NFT focused rather than core AI technical innovation or open frameworks.

notes: Sparse high-signal activity from seed experts (mostly personal posts); global search surfaced strong memory management and agent framework/benchmark updates. Selected max relevant items meeting criteria.
